channel.title: Free server for a WordPress site
channel.description: This question might had been answered but please bear with me as I'm currently new to Frontity.currently I'm setting up a local server for my Wordpress site json data but I was wondering what's an alternative option for PHP server if I'm going to deploy my WordPress site as the one that were mentioned in the docs were pricey and cost a dollar.

item.title: Free server for a WordPress site
item.dc:creator: judelaurentetejada
item.description:
Thanks for suggesting I have tried 000webhost but due to the free tier its a bit slow to load up but nonetheless it gets the job done

Read full topic
item.source: Free server for a WordPress site

item.title: Free server for a WordPress site
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @judelaurentetejada,

Welcome to the Community!

Here you have some options to a get free hosting for your WordPress site

Web Design Envato Tuts+

5 Best Free WordPress Hosting Providers for 2020

Are you looking for someone to host your WordPress website, but aren’t sure whether free or premium hosting is right for you?If your website is going to be a success, then you need the right...

WordPress.com may be the most simple and the most recommended option to start with and it works perfectly with Frontity

Read full topic
item.source: Free server for a WordPress site

item.title: Free server for a WordPress site
item.dc:creator: judelaurentetejada
item.description:
This question might had been answered but please bear with me as I’m currently new to Frontity.currently I’m setting up a local server for my Wordpress site json data but I was wondering what’s an alternative option for PHP server if I’m going to deploy my WordPress site as the one that were mentioned in the docs were pricey and cost a dollar.

item.source: Free server for a WordPress site
